macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes Up 0.5% Amid Iran De-Escalation Hopes
items.summary: The S&P 500 Index rose around half a percent on Wednesday, supported by perceptions of Donald Trump seeking an off-ramp to the Iran conflict, holding key support between 6500-6575 despite oil price pressures.

items.title: Stock Indices Slide as Oil Jumps Back to $100
items.summary: US100 futures dropped 0.3% and European indices eyed negative opens after Asian weakness, as oil returned to around $98-$100 amid lower ceasefire odds in the Middle East following Iranian rejections of Trump's peace plan.

items.title: Iran Rejects Trump's Peace Plan, Escalates Middle East Tensions
items.summary: Iran dismissed Trump's peace proposal, with Israeli forces launching new attacks; IDF and Netanyahu aim to neutralize Iran's leadership, driving oil spikes and equity market concerns.

items.title: US Oil Inventories Surge, WTI Holds Above $88
items.summary: US oil inventories rose sharply again, yet WTI oil remained stable above $88, with prices climbing back toward $100 amid Middle East disruptions; Exxon ramps up shale production to double output.

items.title: Fed Speeches and Jobless Claims in Focus Today
items.summary: Market attention turns to US jobless claims data and speeches from Fed members Stephen Miran and Lisa Cook; rising 10-year Treasury yields above 4.36% strengthen the USD, pressuring EUR/USD to 1.158.

items.title: Rivian Announces Uber Partnership for R2 Model
items.summary: Rivian revealed a partnership with Uber and launched the R2 model, positioning it as a potential 'Tesla killer' amid ongoing market volatility.

items.title: USPS Imposes 8% Surcharge on Shipments Due to Jet Fuel Costs
items.summary: The US Postal Service will add an 8% surcharge on shipments to cover rising jet fuel expenses driven by oil price surges.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Spot Bitcoin ETF Launch Imminent
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF is ready to launch at any moment amid expanding institutional infrastructure. CFTC chairman announces perpetual futures will return to US markets within a month.

items.title: CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Ban Impacts Circle and Coinbase Stocks
items.summary: The CLARITY Act's stablecoin yield ban caused Circle shares to drop 20% and Coinbase 10%, with Senate vote expected within six weeks or delayed to 2027. The act aims to clarify SEC/CFTC roles and rules for stablecoins and DeFi.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $70K Amid Extreme Fear
items.summary: Bitcoin fell below $70K to around $69K with Crypto Fear & Greed Index at 9, signaling depressed sentiment. $18.6B Bitcoin options expiry looms Friday, potentially pressuring prices if no rally occurs.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds at $70,692 with RWA Tokens Surging
items.summary: Bitcoin trades at $70,692 (+0.33% 24h) and Ethereum at $2,146 (-0.18% 24h), with top sectors RWA (e.g., ARIAIP +96.82%) and AI tokens leading gains amid geopolitical calm from Trump's Iran negotiation window.

items.title: Visa Joins Canton Network as Super Validator
items.summary: Visa participated in blockchain governance for the first time by joining the Canton Network as a super validator. Franklin Templeton partnered with Ondo Finance for 24/7 tradable tokenized ETFs.

items.title: Reserve Bank of Australia Backs Tokenization
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia supports tokenization via a new sandbox for testing tokenized assets, with global tokenized asset value projected to hit $2T by 2030.

items.title: Soneium Raises $63M for Layer 1 Tokenized Securities Blockchain
items.summary: Startale Group completed $63M funding for Soneium’s Layer 1 blockchain focused on tokenized securities.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: GameStop Posts 14% Fall in Quarterly Revenue Amid Digital Gaming Shift
items.summary: GameStop reported a significant decline in hardware and accessories sales to $535.6 million for the fourth quarter, down from $725.8 million, reflecting the ongoing shift toward digital gaming.

items.title: Bungie's Marathon Set for March 2026 Release at $40
items.summary: After a six-month delay following negative closed alpha feedback, Bungie and PlayStation confirmed that the extraction shooter Marathon will release in March 2026 at $39.99 across Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with full cross-play support.

items.title: Epic Games Cuts Over 1,000 Jobs
items.summary: Fortnite maker Epic Games announced layoffs of over 1,000 employees, citing declining Fortnite engagement and broader economic pressures affecting the video game industry.

items.title: Nintendo Introduces Tiered Game Pricing on Nintendo Switch 2
items.summary: Nintendo announced differentiated pricing for digital and physical games on Switch 2, with digital versions offering up to $10 savings on new releases like Yoshi and the Mysterious Book.

items.title: Verse8 Raises $5M for AI-Driven Game Creation Platform
items.summary: Verse8 announced a $5 million funding round for its AI-powered game creation platform, marking continued investment in artificial intelligence tools for game development.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
